scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,client" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --include=dev --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
